ogTitle: Saunders Beach vs Saxby: Climate Safety

heading: Saunders Beach vs Saxby — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Saunders Beach, Queensland and Saxby, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Saxby has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Saunders Beach (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Saunders Beach or Saxby safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Saunders Beach has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Saxby scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Saunders Beach scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Saxby scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Saunders Beach or Saxby?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Saxby has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
